resources.string: Mining
Extract valuable ores and gems from the earth.
Fishing
Catch fish and aquatic treasures from the waters.
Woodcutting
Chop trees and gather various types of wood.
Farming
Plant and harvest crops from your farming patches.
Firemaking
Burn logs to gain Firemaking experience.
Agility
Train your agility to reduce session times. Every 10 levels grants 5% faster sessions.
Smithing
Smelt ores into bars and forge powerful metal equipment.
Cooking
Cook raw ingredients into food that restores HP in combat.
Fletching
Craft bows and arrows from logs and metal components.
Crafting
Create jewellery and other crafted items from precious materials.
Runecrafting
Craft magical runes from rune essence for use in spellcasting.
Attack
Improves your melee accuracy, increasing your chance to hit.
Strength
Increases your maximum melee damage per hit.
Defense
Reduces the damage you take from enemy attacks.
Ranged
Attack enemies from a safe distance using a bow and arrows.
Magic
Cast powerful spells using runes. Higher levels unlock stronger spells.
Hitpoints
Your total health. Higher levels let you survive longer in combat.
Prayer
Bury bones to earn Prayer XP and unlock powerful combat prayers.
Beginner Course
A simple obstacle course for those just starting their agility training.
Novice Course
A slightly more challenging course with basic obstacles.
Apprentice Course
An intermediate course requiring some skill to navigate.
Intermediate Course
A moderately difficult course with tricky obstacles.
Advanced Course
A challenging course that tests your agility prowess.
Expert Course
An expert-level course with dangerous obstacles.
Elite Course
Only the most agile can master this elite course.
Master Course
A master-tier course with extreme obstacles.
Veteran Course
A veteran\'s training ground with punishing challenges.
Champion Course
A champion-level course that pushes you to your limits.
Heroic Course
A heroic course where only the best dare to tread.
Legendary Course
A legendary course spoken of in whispers among the agile elite.
Mythic Course
A mythical course that defies the laws of physics.
Divine Course
A divine course blessed by the gods of agility.
Transcendent Course
The ultimate test of agility, transcending mortal limits.
